questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: What digit will be on the face opposite to face having digit 1 in the two positions of a single dice given below?

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: In the following question, two positions of a single dice are given. Find the face which is opposite to the face having digit 6.

solutions.solution: In both the positions of dice, common digit 2 is on the same face. In position I, right face has digit 1 while in position II, right face has digit 3. Therefore, 1 and 3 are on opposite faces.
